name: Blackeyed Peas Spinach
recipeIngredient: 2 cups blackeyed peas (cooked in pressure cooker for 10-15 minutes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the onions and garlic until transparent. If using nonstick pan, add a little spray oil.
2. Add chopped tomatoes and sauté until they break down into a paste. Stir in curry powder to taste.
3. Add spinach and cook until wilted.
4. Stir in the cooked blackeyed peas and bean cooking liquid.
5. Cook on low heat until slightly dry.
6. Serve over brown rice if desired, and add lemon juice and nonfat yogurt for extra flavor (optional).
